aleabit.layer_label: Layer 3 — AI server liquid cooling / data center precision cooling
aleabit.thesis: Yingweike is the consensus China liquid-cooling pick — the bottleneck is genuine but the market already priced it in: a PB above 30 at ~$14B mcap is not a chokepoint trade, it's a momentum trade. The thesis is right; the entry is gone.
